decks.notes: The main concept of this UR Aggro deck is to utilize cheap and efficient spells like Lava Dart, Lightning Bolt, and Mutagenic Growth to quickly apply pressure to the opponent while maintaining card advantage through cards like Mishra's Bauble and Expressive Iteration. The deck aims to tempo out the opponent with early aggressive creatures such as Monastery Swiftspear and Slickshot Show-Off, leveraging their abilities to deal damage and control the board state. Additionally, utilizing fetch lands like Arid Mesa and Wooded Foothills allows for consistent mana fixing and thinning of the deck.

The deck revolves around controlling the game using powerful Eldrazi creatures and disruption spells while assembling the UrzaTron lands for mana acceleration. Karn, the Great Creator and Ugin, Eye of the Storms provide additional control and threats, while Thought-Knot Seer and Glaring Fleshraker disrupt opponents' hands and board states. The deck also includes versatile cards like Chalice of the Void and Warping Wail to handle different situations. The goal is to overwhelm opponents with big threats and disruption while utilizing the UrzaTron lands for mana advantage and consistency.

The focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggressive creatures and direct damage spells. Utilizing cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer to apply pressure early on, while also using cards like Guide of Souls and Goblin Bombardment to control the board and deal incremental damage. The deck also includes some versatile removal spells like Fatal Push and Galvanic Discharge to handle threats from the opponent. Overall, the key concept is to build a fast and efficient aggro deck that can quickly take control of the game.

The deck focuses on utilizing creature toolbox cards along with combo pieces to create powerful synergies and overwhelming board presence. The deck includes a variety of creatures with abilities to generate value and disrupt opponents, as well as ways to tutor for specific creatures using cards like Green Sun's Zenith. The deck also includes powerful combo pieces like Agatha's Soul Cauldron and Yawgmoth, Thran Physician to create game-winning combos. By assembling the right combination of creatures and utilizing their abilities effectively, the deck aims to outvalue and outpace opponents in a Modern 1 vs 1 format.

This deck revolves around quickly ramping mana through land combos, utilizing Amulet of Vigor to untap lands for explosive plays. It aims to assemble the Titan combo to search for and play powerful lands like Urza's Saga, Cultivator Colossus, and Simic Growth Chamber. It also includes cards like Scapeshift and Green Sun's Zenith for additional tutoring and ramping. The key strategy is to efficiently search for and play key pieces while maintaining mana advantage to overwhelm opponents with big threats and powerful land interactions.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on utilizing efficient creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls to apply pressure on the opponent. With cards like Goblin Bombardment and Galvanic Discharge for removal, the deck aims to control the board while maintaining a strong attacking presence. Cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Voice of Victory provide additional tools for winning the game quickly. The inclusion of utility cards like Thraben Charm and Ranger-Captain of Eos adds versatility to the deck, allowing it to adapt to different situations and opponents.

The deck focuses on ramping up mana quickly with Eldrazi Temples and Utopia Sprawls to cast powerful Eldrazi creatures like Emrakul, the Promised End and World Breaker. Control elements are included with cards like Kozilek's Command and Ugin, Eye of the Storms to disrupt opponent's strategies. Malevolent Rumble and Sire of Seven Deaths provide additional threats and removal options. The deck aims to overwhelm opponents with huge Eldrazi creatures while controlling the game with a mix of ramp and disruptive spells.

The main idea of this deck is to ramp up quickly using Eldrazi Temple and Green Sun's Zenith to bring out powerful Eldrazi creatures like Emrakul, the Promised End. The control aspect comes from cards like Malevolent Rumble and Fight Rigging to disrupt the opponent's strategy. Turntimber Symbiosis can be used to search for additional threats, while Disciple of Freyalise and Fanatic of Rhonas help generate mana for big plays. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with massive creatures while maintaining control of the board.

This deck focuses on playing aggressive spells and creatures to quickly deal damage to the opponent. By utilizing cheap spells like Lightning Bolt and Lava Dart, along with efficient creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Dragon's Rage Channeler, the deck aims to apply pressure early on and finish the game swiftly. The deck also includes cards like Mishra's Bauble and Expressive Iteration to help filter through the deck and find the necessary resources to keep the aggression going. In essence, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with its speed and efficiency.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly establishing board presence with efficient creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Ocelot Pride, backed up by powerful removal spells such as Galvanic Discharge and Thraben Charm. The deck aims to apply pressure on the opponent early in the game and overwhelm them with a mix of aggressive creatures and burn spells. Cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Ranger-Captain of Eos provide additional support and versatility, while cards like Voice of Victory and The Legend of Roku offer extra utility and advantage in combat situations.

This deck focuses on controlling the game through a combination of disruption, removal, and countermagic. By using cards like Thoughtseize, Counterspell, and Force of Negation, it aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while protecting its own key threats. The deck also includes efficient removal spells like Fatal Push and Drown in the Loch to deal with opposing creatures. Tasigur, the Golden Fang and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares provide powerful win conditions, while cards like Subtlety and Psychic Frog provide additional card advantage and control options. The mana base is designed to support the deck's color requirements and ensure consistent access to key spells.

The Amulet Titan deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana to play Primeval Titan and search for powerful utility lands such as Vesuva and Boseiju, Who Endures. By using cards like Amulet of Vigor and Arboreal Grazer, the deck can generate a lot of mana and play key cards like Scapeshift or Green Sun's Zenith to search for important creatures like Cultivator Colossus or Aftermath Analyst. The deck aims to efficiently assemble its combo pieces and overwhelm the opponent with powerful threats and land interactions.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly equip Colossus Hammers onto creatures, primarily Puresteel Paladin, to create a powerful threat on the battlefield. The deck aims to efficiently search for and play equipment cards, utilizing Stoneforge Mystic and Urza's Saga to assemble the combo pieces. With the right setup, the deck can generate explosive turns by equipping multiple hammers and attacking for lethal damage in a single swing. Additionally, the deck includes cards like Metallic Rebuke and Esper Sentinel to disrupt opponents' plans and protect its own combo.

The deck focuses on quickly deploying artifacts to power out aggressive threats and disrupt the opponent's game plan. It utilizes cards like Mox Opal and Urza's Saga to generate mana and card advantage, while also using Engineered Explosives and Metallic Rebuke to control the board. Emry, Lurker of the Loch provides additional recursion and value, while cards like Claws of Gix and Pithing Needle provide utility and disruption. The deck's goal is to overwhelm the opponent with fast, efficient creatures and disruptive spells, while also generating value from its artifact synergy.

The Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and efficient removal spells. By utilizing powerful cards like Ajani, Guide of Souls, and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer, the deck can put pressure on the opponent from the early turns of the game. With a mix of creatures, burn spells, and disruption effects like Mana Tithe and Static Prison, this deck aims to end the game quickly before the opponent can stabilize. The inclusion of powerful planeswalkers like Ajani and Boromir, Warden of the Tower adds additional versatility and threats to the deck.

The deck focuses on using Basking Broodscale and Blade of the Bloodchief to generate value by sacrificing creatures and boosting others. It also includes Eldrazi creatures like Emrakul, the Promised End and Glaring Fleshraker for additional threats. The deck utilizes ramp with Eldrazi Temple and Urza's Saga, while also running disruption and removal spells like Kozilek's Command and Unholy Heat. The inclusion of cards like Vexing Bauble and Haywire Mite allows for card draw and mana fixing, making the deck versatile and able to adapt to various situations.
